name: Product Card
description: Single product/post display card with thumbnail, price, type indicator, and actions. Used within product grids.

list.description: Horizontal list row item with small thumbnail on the left and title, description, and price on the right

featured.description: Large featured card with more details

visual_brief: Bordered card displaying a single product or content item. A thumbnail image fills the top portion of the card. Below the image, the product title in medium-weight text, a price displayed prominently (or 'Free' badge), and a type indicator badge (video, audio, image, document). Action buttons in the card footer allow quick purchase or preview. The list preset renders as a horizontal row with a small thumbnail on the left. The featured preset enlarges the card with a gradient overlay on the image and a 'Featured' badge. Hover state lifts the card with a subtle shadow increase.

responsive.mobile: Cards take full width in single column. Thumbnail height reduces. Price and title prominent. Action buttons full-width.
responsive.tablet: Two-column card grid. Standard card proportions.
responsive.desktop: Three or four column grid. Cards at comfortable size with hover effects.

composition.ProductCard: Card(d-surface, hoverable, lift-on-hover) > [Thumbnail(aspect-ratio) + Title(font-medium) + Price(heading4) | FreeBadge(d-annotation) + TypeBadge(d-annotation) + ActionButtons?(d-interactive)]
composition.FeaturedCard: Card(d-surface, large, gradient-overlay) > [Media + Content > [Title + Description + Meta] + Actions(d-interactive)]
